title: SERVICE CORPORATION INTERNATIONAL DECLARES QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Service Corporation International (NYSE:SCI), North America's largest deathcare provider, announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.34 per share, payable on March 31, 2026 to shareholders of record as of March 13, 2026. The company intends to pay regular quarterly dividends but notes that future dividend declarations remain subject to Board approval.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.34 per share and expressed intent to continue paying regular quarterly dividends, demonstrating financial strength and commitment to shareholder returns. This is a positive signal for investors seeking dividend income.

title: 3 Dividend-Backed Consumer Staples to Reinforce Your Portfolio
author: Dan Schmidt
description: The article highlights three consumer staples stocks as defensive investments during market volatility: Waste Management Inc. (WM) with a 52% dividend payout ratio and 22-year history of increases; British American Tobacco plc (BTI) yielding over 5% with 19 consecutive years of payout increases; and Service Corporation International Inc. (SCI) with a 1.68% yield and 15-year streak of dividend increases. These companies benefit from inelastic demand, pricing power, and low volatility relative to broader markets.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong dividend safety with 52% payout ratio and 22-year history of annual increases. Company has near-monopoly in landfill operations due to regulatory barriers. Stock showing bullish technical signals with breakout above 200-day SMA and confirmed MACD bullish cross.

High dividend yield exceeding 5% with 19 consecutive years of payout increases. Successful pivot to smokeless products reinvigorating revenue. Stock returned nearly 60% in last 12 months with bullish wedge formation and strengthening momentum indicators (MACD and RSI).

Sustainable dividend with 36.7% payout ratio and 15-year streak of increases. Dividend growing at 10.57% annualized rate over five years. Strong cash position with raised 2025 guidance supporting future payout growth. Technical chart shows positive momentum with RSI recovery and breakout above key moving averages.

title: SERVICE CORPORATION INTERNATIONAL INCREASES QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Service Corporation International announced a 6.3% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.34 per share, payable on December 31, 2025, to shareholders of record as of December 15, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company increased its quarterly dividend by 6.3%, signaling financial strength and commitment to returning value to shareholders. The press release indicates confidence in ongoing financial performance and ability to sustain dividend payments.

title: SERVICE CORPORATION INTERNATIONAL DECLARES QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Service Corporation International announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per share, payable on September 30, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 15, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is maintaining its dividend commitment, demonstrating financial stability and consistent shareholder returns. The press release indicates ongoing financial health and commitment to regular dividend payments.

title: SERVICE CORPORATION INTERNATIONAL DECLARES QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND AND INCREASES SHARE REPURCHASE AUTHORIZATION
author: Prnewswire
description: Service Corporation International, the largest provider of deathcare products and services in North America, announced a quarterly cash dividend and an increase in its share repurchase authorization.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced a quarterly cash dividend and an increase in its share repurchase authorization, indicating financial stability and shareholder-friendly policies.
